title: Meta Ads Intelligence
subtitle: Monitor competitor paid media across Facebook and Instagram

betaNotice.title: Meta Ads Intelligence is in beta
betaNotice.description: We're finalizing the Meta Ad Library integration. Below you can preview the experience with sample data. When the integration is live, you'll be able to track real competitor ads, analyze messaging strategies, and monitor spend patterns automatically.
betaNotice.premiumNote: This feature will be available on the Premium plan when launched.

upgradeCard.title: Get early access to Meta Ads Intelligence
upgradeCard.description: Premium users will be the first to access real ad tracking and AI analysis when this feature launches.

samplePreview.title: Sample Ads Preview
samplePreview.disclaimer: These are sample ads for preview purposes only. No real data is being fetched or displayed.

featureList.title: When Meta Ads Intelligence launches, you'll be able to:

trackAds.title: Track competitor ads
trackAds.desc: Automatically import ads from Meta Ad Library

aiAnalysis.title: AI-powered analysis
aiAnalysis.desc: Analyze messaging angles, offers, and urgency patterns

spendMonitoring.title: Spend monitoring
spendMonitoring.desc: Track estimated spend ranges across competitors

adDetail.title: Ad Details
adDetail.aiAnalysisNote: AI analysis will be available when the Meta Ads integration launches.
